name: @qwadratic/create-mvp
description: Sentence in, software out — agents write the Makefile DAG, make runs the agents. Runs on the coding agent CLI you already have (claude -p, pi -p, codex, gemini).
author: qwadratic

scripts.prepublishOnly: git diff --quiet HEAD -- bin engine evals || { echo "REFUSED: dirty working tree in packaged paths — commit first (0.1.0 shipped a mid-edit snapshot this way)"; exit 1; }
